title: STAEDTLER 364 WP4 Textsurfer Classic Highlighter - Assorted Colours (Pack of 4)
features: InkJet safe - does not smudge inkjet printouts and handwritten texts
For paper, fax and carbon copies
description: From the manufacturer Long-lasting and colourful highlighters STAEDTLER’s Classic Textsurfer highlighters are available in a variety of neon, pastel and vintage colours - ideal for highlighting, marking, bullet journaling, diary writing and making study notes. These highlighters offer extra-long highlighting performance and are fast-drying so they're not easily smudged on paper. The ultra-soft chisel tip, approx. 1-5mm, provides excellent ink flow and makes these highlighters easy to use. Available in 20 colours The Textsurfer Classic highlighters are available in 20 colours! Choose between classic neon, pastel & vintage colours. The back hide-lighter covers up text and lines, however the text still remains legible and becomes illegible once paper copied. Ultra-soft highlighting The Textsurfer Classic's ultra-soft chiselled tips make them suitable for both thick (5mm) and thin (1mm) highlighting. Refillable ink Many of the Textsurfer Classic highlighter colours are refillable! If your marker runs out, you can refill it with the suitable STAEDTLER refill station. Copy-proof colours The violet and turquoise Textsurfer Classic highlighters are also copy-proof, which means your highlighting will still be visible on black and white photocopies.
